title: Start a valid match with seated players and locked leaders
description: Verifies that the host can start the game once enough players are seated and all required Party Leaders are locked.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the hero name field with a valid unique name
Join the shared tavern lobby
Open a second browser session to /
Fill in the hero name field with another valid unique name
Join the shared tavern lobby
Have each seated player lock a Party Leader
Start the game as the host
Verify the active game board is displayed
Verify hands are dealt and monsters are revealed

title: Block host start until leaders are locked
description: Verifies that the host cannot start a match before the seated players have locked their Party Leaders.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the hero name field with a valid unique name
Join the shared tavern lobby
Attempt to start the game before any leaders are locked
Verify the match does not start
Verify a start-game gating message is visible

title: Start a valid match after all seated players lock leaders
description: This verifies that the host can start the game only after at least two seated players have locked Party Leaders and the match transitions into active play.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the host hero name field with a unique hero name
Click to join the shared tavern lobby
Click a Party Leader to roll one
Lock in the rolled Party Leader
Fill in the second hero name field with a different unique hero name
Click to join the shared tavern lobby as another player
Roll and lock a Party Leader for the second player
Start the match as the host
Verify the game transitions out of the lobby
Verify active play begins with players and monsters displayed

title: Join the tavern lobby with a hero name
description: Verifies that a returning player can enter a hero name and join the shared tavern lobby successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the hero name field with a valid unique name
Join the shared tavern lobby
Verify the lobby view is displayed
Verify the player appears seated in the lobby

title: Join the lobby with a hero name and see yourself seated
description: This verifies that a player can enter a hero name, join the shared tavern lobby, and appear on the board as a seated player.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the hero name field with a unique hero name
Click to join the shared tavern lobby
Verify the player appears on the tavern board
Verify the hero name is accepted and shown in the lobby

title: Roll and lock a Party Leader
description: Verifies that a seated player can roll for party leaders, choose one, and lock it successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the hero name field with a valid unique name
Join the shared tavern lobby
Roll for a Party Leader
Choose one of the available Party Leaders
Lock the selected Party Leader
Verify the selected leader is locked in
Verify the leader selection is no longer editable

title: Show the victory modal when a player wins
description: This verifies that a completed win condition displays the game-over modal with the winner and winning reason.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the victory modal is not shown before the game is won
Reach a winning game state
Verify a victory modal is displayed
Verify the winner and winning reason are shown

title: Return to the lobby after a win
description: This verifies that a player can leave the game-over state and reset back to the lobby after a victory.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Reach the victory modal
Choose to go back to the lobby
Verify the lobby is displayed again
Verify the game-over modal is no longer shown

title: Keep the match from starting until all seated players have leaders
description: This verifies that the lobby stays gated when at least two players are present but one seated player has not locked a Party Leader.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the first hero name field with a unique hero name
Click to join the shared tavern lobby
Click a Party Leader to roll one
Lock in the rolled Party Leader
Fill in the second hero name field with a different unique hero name
Click to join the shared tavern lobby as another player
Verify the host start control is not available yet
Verify the match remains in the lobby state

title: Resume the lobby after the game is reset
description: This verifies that after the match is reset, the app returns to the lobby state so players can join again.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Reach a finished or reset game state
Return to the lobby
Verify the tavern lobby is visible again
Verify players can rejoin from the lobby state

title: Display the winning reason for monster victory
description: This verifies that the game-over screen clearly identifies a monster-based win condition.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Reach a winning game state
Verify a victory modal is displayed
Verify the monster victory reason is shown

title: Prevent claiming an already locked leader
description: Verifies that a claimed Party Leader becomes unavailable to other players after it is locked.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the hero name field with a valid unique name
Join the shared tavern lobby
Roll for a Party Leader
Choose one of the available Party Leaders
Lock the selected Party Leader
Open a second browser session to /
Fill in the hero name field with another valid unique name
Join the shared tavern lobby
Roll for a Party Leader
Verify the locked leader is unavailable to the second player
Verify the second player can still choose from the remaining leaders

title: Draw cards and end the turn while action points decrease
description: This verifies that an active player can spend action points to draw cards and end the turn with the expected AP reduction visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Reach an active player turn
Draw a card
End the turn
Verify the action points decrease after drawing
Verify the turn ends for the active player

title: Display the winning reason for class victory
description: This verifies that the game-over screen clearly identifies a class-collection win condition.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Reach a winning game state
Verify a victory modal is displayed
Verify the class victory reason is shown

title: Reroll a Party Leader before locking it
description: This verifies that a player can change their rolled Party Leader before confirming their final selection.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the hero name field with a unique hero name
Click to join the shared tavern lobby
Click a Party Leader to roll one
Reroll the Party Leader
Lock in the current Party Leader
Verify a Party Leader is locked
Verify the leader selection remains fixed after locking

title: Reject an empty hero name
description: Verifies that joining is blocked when the hero name is left empty and a validation message is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Leave the hero name field empty
Join the shared tavern lobby
Verify a hero name validation error is visible
Verify the player is not joined to the lobby

title: Resolve a dice roll and final result
description: Verifies that a roll-based action shows the dice breakdown and then resolves to a final result.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Join the shared tavern lobby with an active game in progress
Trigger a roll-based action
Roll the dice manually
Verify the dice breakdown is displayed
Verify the final result is shown

title: Reset the board state after returning to the lobby
description: This verifies that returning to the lobby clears the finished match view and brings the app back to the pre-game state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Reach the victory modal
Choose to go back to the lobby
Verify the lobby state is displayed instead of the game board
Verify the finished match state is cleared

title: Reject a duplicate hero name
description: Verifies that a player cannot join with a name already in use and is shown a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the hero name field with a valid unique name
Join the shared tavern lobby
Refresh the page
Fill in the hero name field with the same name
Join the shared tavern lobby
Verify a duplicate hero name validation error is visible
Verify the second player is not joined to the lobby

title: See claimed Party Leaders become unavailable to another player
description: This verifies that when one player locks a Party Leader, a second player cannot claim that same leader and sees it as unavailable.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the first hero name field with a unique hero name
Click to join the shared tavern lobby
Click a Party Leader to roll one
Lock in the rolled Party Leader
Fill in the second hero name field with a different unique hero name
Click to join the shared tavern lobby as another player
Open the leader grid for the second player
Verify the claimed Party Leader is unavailable to the second player
Verify the second player can still see the remaining leader choices

title: Reload the hand and continue the turn
description: This verifies that an active player can reload their hand, replacing the current hand with a fresh draw and continuing the turn state correctly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Reach an active player turn
Reload the hand
End the turn
Verify the hand is refreshed after reloading
Verify the turn remains valid after the reload action

title: Stage a modifier and pass in the roll window
description: Verifies that a player can stage a modifier card during the modifier window and then pass on additional modifiers before the roll resolves.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Join the shared tavern lobby with an active game in progress
Trigger a pending roll window
Stage a modifier card during the modifier window
Pass on additional modifiers
Verify the modified roll resolves
Verify the modifier action is reflected in the roll outcome

title: Allow starting a new match after resetting to the lobby
description: This verifies that after a reset, the app is ready to begin a fresh lobby flow without lingering game-over state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Reach the victory modal
Choose to go back to the lobby
Begin a new lobby flow
Verify the lobby accepts a fresh start
Verify no previous victory modal remains visible

title: Show lobby updates when another player joins
description: Verifies that the shared tavern lobby updates in real time when a new player seats themselves.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the hero name field with a valid unique name
Join the shared tavern lobby
Open a second browser session to /
Fill in the hero name field with another valid unique name
Join the shared tavern lobby
Verify the lobby updates to show the additional seated player

title: Prevent further actions after action points are exhausted
description: This verifies that when an active player spends all action points, additional turn actions are blocked in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Reach an active player turn
Spend all available action points
Attempt another turn action
Verify no action points remain
Verify the extra action is blocked

title: Challenge an opponent's card play
description: Verifies that an opponent can challenge a played Hero, Item, or Magic card and see the challenge resolve through a roll-off.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Join the shared tavern lobby with an active game in progress
Reach an opponent's card play challenge window
Select a challenge card from hand
Play the challenge
Verify the challenge resolves through a roll-off
Verify the card play outcome is updated

title: Reset back to the lobby after a disconnect
description: Verifies that the game returns to the lobby state when a connected player disconnects.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the hero name field with a valid unique name
Join the shared tavern lobby
Open a second browser session to /
Fill in the hero name field with another valid unique name
Join the shared tavern lobby
Disconnect the second browser session
Verify the lobby is shown again
Verify the seated player list is reset

title: Show the reset option after a win
description: This verifies that the victory modal provides a way to return to the lobby after the match ends.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Reach a winning game state
Verify a victory modal is displayed
Verify a reset option is available

title: Use a hero skill on a chosen target
description: Verifies that a player can accept a skill prompt, choose the required target, and see the skill resolve.
category: Hero and Leader Skills, Targeting, and Penalties

steps.description: Navigate to /
Join the shared tavern lobby with an active game in progress
Reach a skill prompt
Choose to use the skill
Select the required target
Verify the skill resolves
Verify the target selection is applied

title: Resolve a penalty by discarding or sacrificing a card
description: Verifies that a player can complete a forced penalty prompt by selecting a card to discard or sacrifice.
category: Hero and Leader Skills, Targeting, and Penalties

steps.description: Navigate to /
Join the shared tavern lobby with an active game in progress
Reach a penalty prompt
Select a card to discard or sacrifice
Verify the penalty resolves
Verify the card is removed from the relevant zone

title: Use an item's action effect
description: Verifies that a player can activate an item's action and see its effect apply in the game.
category: Hero and Leader Skills, Targeting, and Penalties

steps.description: Navigate to /
Join the shared tavern lobby with an active game in progress
Reach a play-item action
Use the item's action
Verify the item effect applies
Verify the item remains or is consumed according to the resolved effect

title: Keep the lobby hidden once victory is reached until reset
description: This verifies that the lobby does not reappear while the game-over screen is still active.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Reach a winning game state
Verify a victory modal is displayed
Verify the lobby is not displayed

title: Skip modifiers and let the roll resolve
description: Verifies that declining modifiers closes the modifier window and allows the roll to resolve normally.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Join the shared tavern lobby with an active game in progress
Trigger a pending roll window
Decline to use any modifiers
Verify the modifier window closes
Verify the roll resolves to a final result

title: Pass on challenging a card play
description: Verifies that an opponent can decline to challenge and allow the original card play to continue resolving.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Join the shared tavern lobby with an active game in progress
Reach an opponent's card play challenge window
Pass the challenge
Verify the challenge window closes
Verify the original card continues resolving

title: Decline a skill prompt
description: Verifies that a player can skip a skill prompt and continue without activating the skill.
category: Hero and Leader Skills, Targeting, and Penalties

steps.description: Navigate to /
Join the shared tavern lobby with an active game in progress
Reach a skill prompt
Decline to use the skill
Verify the skill prompt is dismissed
Verify play continues without the skill resolving
